issues.description: Trigger should be 'EndOfTurn' not 'Activated'. Text says '[End of Your Turn]' which is an end-of-turn trigger, not an activated ability.
Condition should be 'HasAttachedDon' not 'HasRestingDon'. The text refers to 'active DON!! cards' (attached to this character), not rested DON cards.
Target scope should specify that the character must be 'rested'. Current target only filters by cost but misses the rested requirement stated in the text.
